results.rendered_html:
kalyāṇaka (von kalyāṇa)
1〉 adj. f. ˚ṇikā trefflich, rühmende Bez. versch. Arzeneimittel, z. B. des sarpis einer wirksamen Salbe  SUŚR. 2,285,3 . 419,5 . guḍa 506,13 . lavaṇa 519,9 . 37,1 . mahākalyāṇakaṃ ghṛtam 419,16 . glücklich: ūcuḥ saṃśravaṇe ye māṃ dvijāḥ kalyāṇikāṃ śubhām  R. 6,23,7 .
— 2〉 f. kalyāṇikā rother Arsenik (manaḥśilā)  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.
